scaled_oracle_cases.description: Valid parsing of lines with comments, empty lines, leading whitespace, alternative chromosome naming, and annotation handling
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The function must correctly parse lines with comments, empty lines, whitespace, alternative chromosome naming, and treat second field with '>' as annotation (gene = '-')
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Lines starting with '#' are ignored; empty lines are ignored; leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed; chromosome names are taken as given; if second field contains '>' or '=', set gene to '-'
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old solution would include comment/empty lines as malformed rows, fail on whitespace, or treat REF>ALT as gene symbol
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
sample_lines = [
    '# comment line',
    '',
    '  chr1:100-200 geneA  ',
    '1:300-400',
    'chr5:500-600 REF>ALT'
]
with open('coords.txt', 'w') as f:
    for line in sample_lines:
        f.write(line + '\n')
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least one test for comments, empty lines, whitespace, and alternative chromosome naming.
Scaled executable cases must include tests for start>end error, annotation vs gene handling, and malformed coordinate error.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Should raise ValueError when start > end
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The function must validate that start <= end and raise ValueError otherwise
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old solution would include the row without error
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests for start>end error, annotation vs gene handling, and malformed coordinate error.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Should raise ValueError when coordinate format is malformed (missing colon)
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The function must raise ValueError for malformed coordinates (missing colon)
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: If coordinate format missing colon, raise ValueError
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old solution would cause IndexError or incorrect parse
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests for start>end error, annotation vs gene handling, and malformed coordinate error.
